betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Yellowcake§f

§aThe first step in uranium enrichment — turn raw uranium into processable yellowcake powder!§f

§bYellowcake§f is a fine yellow powder (0.5 RAD/s) produced from uranium billets. It is the essential intermediate between raw uranium and uranium hexafluoride for gas centrifuge enrichment.

§6Production§f (Chemical Plant):
§b• 500mB§f Hydrogen Peroxide
§b• 2§f Uranium Billets
§b• 2§f Sulfur
§b→ §eYellowcake§f

§6Uses§f — Uranium Hexafluoride Production (Chemical Plant):
§b• 1,000mB§f Water
§b• §eYellowcake§f
§b• 4§f Fluorite
§b→ §e1,200mB§f Uranium Hexafluoride + §e2§f Sulfur

Both §bfluorite§f and §bsulfur§f are recyclable — fluorite is an output of the centrifuge chain and sulfur is returned during UF6 production, making the process lossless once started.

§6Storage§f: Can be compacted into granular blocks for storage.

§eTrivia§f: In real life, yellowcake ranges from yellow to black depending on milling methods. The in-game depiction using peroxide and sulfur is accurate. A handful of yellowcake blocks can be found inside §bGeyser§f structures!
